title: gitops-servicemesh-diff
pitch: Diff and validate Istio/GitOps changes with policy checks before merge and sync.
keyFeatures: Render Helm/Kustomize and compute semantic diffs for Istio resources
OPA/Kyverno-style rule engine for custom mesh guardrails
GitHub Actions-compatible CLI output with annotations
targetUsers: Kubernetes/Istio teams using Argo CD/Helm who need PR-time safety checks for mesh and GitOps manifests.
